steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content:
A line in slope-intercept form is
$$y=mx+b$$
where $m$ is the slope and $b$ is the $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Substitute slope and intercept
steps.content:
The slope is $\frac{1}{8}$, and the point $(0,12)$ gives the intercept $b=12$.
$$y=\frac{1}{8}x+12$$
The answer is D.
